---
name: Security report
about: Do not use this template for sensitive issues. Use the private guidance in SECURITY.md instead.
title: "[Security] "
labels: security
---

If this issue involves:

- credentials
- auth bypass
- webhook exposure
- secret leakage
- reverse proxy trust
- FileBrowser exposure

do not continue with a public issue.

Read `SECURITY.md` and report it privately with sanitized reproduction details.
